identification_number.description: UN identification number normalized as UN####.

proper_shipping_name.description: ADR proper shipping name in English. Must be clean text and must not start with a digit.

hazard_class.description: ADR hazard class or division, e.g. 3, 8, 6.1, 9.

adr_tunnel_code.description: ADR tunnel restriction code from Table A column 15 where applicable.

tunnel_code_meaning.description: Plain-English operational interpretation of the tunnel code.

limited_quantity.description: Limited quantity value from ADR Table A where applicable.

road_acceptance_status.description: Readiness status for road movement. This is a compliance flag, not handling advice.

hard_gate.description: True when missing required DG declaration/classification/documentation/driver/vehicle/tunnel constraints can block movement.
